title: Greveholm Essentials
description: The modpack aimed to enhance the experience of the Greveholm adventure map.
body:
_**WELCOME TO GREVEHOLM!**
Thanks for picking up the OFFICIAL **Greveholm** brochure! By doing so, you have taken your first step toward **Greveholm**, the bustling, up-and-coming modern metropolis._

This modpack features client-sided mods and some resource packs to enhance the experience of the story-driven adventure map "Greveholm".

**Some of the mods featured are as such:**
- [Spyglass Improvements](https://modrinth.com/mod/spyglass-improvements)
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)
- Visuals-enhancing mods such as [Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain) and [Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds).
- Optimization mods such as [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) and more.

**The resource packs featured are:**
- [Fogulous](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fogulous)
- [Motschen's Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-leaves)
- [Fresh Animations: Player Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fa-player-extension)

# Greveholm is out now! Download [here](https://www.minecraftmaps.com/52270-greveholm).
 Check out the trailer [here.](https://youtu.be/MZ5WiuRiD-Y)

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3649359d4a85c9e2017e4af7ef6a004d31009ed.png)
